site.title: Glenn Laciapag
site.description: Data engineer specializing in Python, SQL, Power BI, and AWS.

hero.name: Glenn
hero.tagline: I build robust data pipelines & synthesize complex datasets 🧪

paragraphs: I am a chemist 🧑🏻‍🔬 turned data engineer 🧑🏻‍💻, passionate about building robust data pipelines and synthesizing complex datasets 🧪. My expertise revolves around Python, SQL, and AWS (Lambda, Glue, Redshift).

I am currently pursuing a Professional Master in Data Science (Analytics) at UP Diliman, and my focus is on the intersection of data engineering and AI, utilizing intelligent systems to drive measurable business value.

experience.description: Designs, develops, and maintains scalable, serverless ETL pipelines using a cost-optimized, event-driven cloud architecture. Focuses on reliable, low-overhead data ingestion and processing without the need for managed infrastructure.

Contributes to internal Python codebases to support end-to-end data workflows, including extracting, transforming, and loading data for business reporting, client data requests, and dashboard development.

Applied statistical analysis, data processing, and visualization techniques in a materials science laboratory setting using SAS JMP and Python. Leveraged experimental datasets to derive insights, support research decisions, and communicate findings, building a strong foundation in data-driven problem solving and quantitative analysis.

posts.title: Getting Started with GitHub Pages
posts.description: A step-by-step guide to hosting your static site for free using GitHub Pages.

footer: © 2026 Glenn. Built with plain HTML, CSS & JS using Claude Code. Hosted on GitHub Pages.
